field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs where status = '1')⩓exists (select 1 from dmdvcsks b where year(b.ngay_ks) >= @@table.nam and @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs)⩓not exists(select 1 from dtkhct b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and @@table.ma_so = b.ma_so and b.nam = @@table.nam) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_new = 1)⩓exists(select 1 from dtkhct b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and @@table.ma_so = b.ma_so and b.nam = @@table.nam) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_edit = 1)

field.name: nam
field.check: exists (select 1 from dmstt b where year(b.ngay_ks) >= @@table.nam)

field.name: ma_vv
field.check: not exists (select 1 from dmvv b where @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv)

field.name: ma_so
field.check: not exists (select 1 from dtdmct b where @@table.ma_so = b.ma_so)

processing.text:
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @message nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @user int, @admin bit, @r int select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID
-- Checking &Checking; if @admin <> 1 begin if @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@admin, @user, 'CostPlanningByArticle', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end end if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from dtkhct b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_so = b.ma_so and b.nam = a.nam) select a.* into #k from @@table a join dtkhct b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_so = b.ma_so and b.nam = a.nam delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_so = b.ma_so and a.nam = b.nam)
-- Insert &Inserting;
-- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
